   328→                    navigationIcon = {
   329→                        IconButton(onClick = { scope.launch { drawerState.open() } }) {
   330→                            Icon(Icons.Default.Menu, contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.settings))
   331→                        }
   332→                    }
   333→                )
   334→            }
   335→        ) { paddingValues ->
   336→            Box(
   337→                modifier = Modifier
   338→                    .fillMaxSize()
   339→                    .padding(paddingValues)
   340→                    .background(Color(0xFF1A1A1A))
   341→            ) {
   342→                // 视频网格
   343→                LazyVerticalGrid(
   344→                    columns = GridCells.Fixed(2),
   345→                    contentPadding = PaddingValues(16.dp),
   346→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp),
   347→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp),
   348→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()
   349→                ) {
   350→                    items(videoList) { video ->
   351→                        VideoGridItem(
   352→                            video = video,
   353→                            isSelected = selectedVideoId == video.id,
   354→                            onVideoTouch = { videoId ->
   355→                                selectedVideoId = if (selectedVideoId == videoId) null else videoId
   356→                            }
   357→                        )
   358→                    }
   359→                }
   360→
   361→                // 添加视频按钮
   362→                FloatingActionButton(
   363→                    onClick = { videoPickerLauncher.launch(arrayOf("video/*")) },
   364→                    modifier = Modifier
   365→                        .align(Alignment.BottomCenter)
   366→                        .padding(bottom = 32.dp),
   367→                    containerColor = Color(0xFFB39DDB)
   368→                ) {
   369→                    Icon(
   370→                        imageVector = Icons.Default.Add,
   371→                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.choose_video_file),
   372→                        tint = Color.White
   373→                    )
   374→                }
   375→            }
   376→        }
   377→    }
   378→}
   379→
   380→@Composable
   381→fun VideoGridItem(
   382→    video: VideoItem,
   383→    isSelected: Boolean,
   384→    onVideoTouch: (Int) -> Unit
   385→) {
   386→    val context = LocalContext.current
   387→    var isPlaying by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   388→    val exoPlayer = remember {
   389→        ExoPlayer.Builder(context).build().apply {
   390→            video.uri?.let { uri ->
   391→                setMediaItem(MediaItem.fromUri(uri))
   392→                prepare()
   393→                volume = 0f // 静音
   394→                repeatMode = Player.REPEAT_MODE_ONE
   395→            }
   396→        }
   397→    }
   398→
   399→    DisposableEffect(Unit) {
   400→        onDispose {
   401→            exoPlayer.release()
   402→        }
   403→    }
   404→
   405→    LaunchedEffect(isSelected) {
   406→        if (isSelected) {
   407→            exoPlayer.play()
   408→            isPlaying = true
   409→        } else {
   410→            exoPlayer.pause()
   411→            exoPlayer.seekTo(0)
   412→            isPlaying = false
   413→        }
   414→    }
   415→
   416→    Box(
   417→        modifier = Modifier
   418→            .aspectRatio(3f / 4f)
   419→            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(12.dp))
   420→            .border(
   421→                width = 2.dp,
   422→                color = Color(0xFFB39DDB), // 淡紫色边框
   423→                shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp)
   424→            )
   425→            .background(Color(0xFF2A2A2A))
   426→            .pointerInput(Unit) {
   427→                detectTapGestures(
   428→                    onPress = {
   429→                        onVideoTouch(video.id)
   430→                        tryAwaitRelease()
   431→                    }
   432→                )
   433→            }
   434→    ) {
   435→        AndroidView(
   436→            factory = { ctx ->
   437→                PlayerView(ctx).apply {
   438→                    player = exoPlayer
   439→                    useController = false
   440→                    layoutParams = android.view.ViewGroup.LayoutParams(
   441→                        android.view.ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
   442→                        android.view.ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
   443→                    )
   444→                }
   445→            },
   446→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()
   447→        )
   448→    }
   449→}
   450→
   451→private fun loadSavedVideos(context: Context): Uri? {
   452→    return try {
   453→        val file = File(context.filesDir, "video_live_wallpaper_file_path")
   454→        if (file.exists()) {
   455→            val path = file.readText()
   456→            Uri.parse(path)
   457→        } else {
   458→            null
   459→        }
   460→    } catch (e: Exception) {
   461→        null
   462→    }
   463→}
   464→
   465→private fun saveVideoUri(context: Context, uri: Uri) {
   466→    // 持久化 URI 权限
   467→    try {
   468→        context.contentResolver.takePersistableUriPermission(
   469→            uri,
   470→            Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION
   471→        )
   472→        android.util.Log.d("MainActivity", "Persistable URI permission granted for: $uri")
   473→    } catch (e: Exception) {
   474→        android.util.Log.e("MainActivity", "Failed to take persistable URI permission", e)
   475→    }
   476→
   477→    // 保存 URI 路径
   478→    context.openFileOutput("video_live_wallpaper_file_path", Context.MODE_PRIVATE).use {
   479→        it.write(uri.toString().toByteArray())
   480→    }
   481→    android.util.Log.d("MainActivity", "Video URI saved: $uri")
   482→}
   483→
   484→private fun saveVideoPath(context: Context, path: String) {
   485→    context.openFileOutput("video_live_wallpaper_file_path", Context.MODE_PRIVATE).use {
   486→        it.write(path.toByteArray())
   487→    }
   488→}

<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SET_WALLPAPER" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        android:maxSdkVersion="32" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SPECIAL_USE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules"
        android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:enableOnBackInvokedCallback="true"
        tools:ignore="MissingApplicationIcon"
        tools:targetApi="tiramisu">
        <activity
            android:name=".activity.MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
        <activity
            android:name=".activity.SettingsActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:label="@string/settings"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.Material3.DayNight">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.APPLICATION_PREFERENCES" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
        <activity
            android:name=".activity.FullscreenVideoActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:theme="@android:style/Theme.NoTitleBar.Fullscreen"
            android:excludeFromRecents="true"
            android:launchMode="singleInstance" />

        <service
            android:name=".service.VideoLiveWallpaperService"
            android:exported="true"
            android:label="@string/app_name"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_WALLPAPER"
            android:process=":wallpaper"
            android:foregroundServiceType="mediaPlayback">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.service.wallpaper.WallpaperService" />
            </intent-filter>
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.service.wallpaper"
                android:resource="@xml/livewallpaper" />
        </service>
        <service
            android:name=".service.ClearDesktopService"
            android:exported="false"
            android:foregroundServiceType="specialUse">
            <property
                android:name="android.app.PROPERTY_SPECIAL_USE_FGS_SUBTYPE"
                android:value="解锁后显示视频壁纸" />
        </service>

        <receiver
            android:name=".broadcast.BootBroadCast"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
        <receiver
            android:name=".broadcast.UnlockReceiver"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.USER_PRESENT" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
    </application>

</manifest>
